units.name: Lord Discordant
units.notes: See your Battleforce datasheet card for exact stats.

abilities.name: Daemon Engine Hunter
abilities.effect: Warp-infused warlord — leads the warband and tears through vehicles.

abilities.name: Warp-Touched Firepower
abilities.effect: Heavy ranged platform — flexible weapons for picking off key targets.

abilities.name: Daemon Engine Rampage
abilities.effect: Fast melee daemon engine — supports the Lord Discordant's push.

units.name: Chaos Cultists
units.notes: Run as one 20-model unit or split per your list — see datasheet.

abilities.name: Objective Rabble
abilities.effect: Cheap bodies to secure footprints and screen for Legionaries.

units.name: Chaos Legionaries
units.notes: Alternatively run as two Cultist squads and five Legionaries — see datasheet.

abilities.name: Legion Core
abilities.effect: Durable battleline troops — hold terrain while characters and engines strike.
